title: AgentFabric Agent Manifest
description: Schema for AgentFabric agent manifest (v1). Defines capabilities, permissions, and metadata for installable agents.

name.description: Unique agent identifier (snake_case). Used for install path and routing.

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose and capabilities.

permissions.description: List of permission scopes the agent may use. Runtime denies any tool or resource not listed.

inputs.description: Declared input names or shapes (semantic; validation is implementation-specific).

outputs.description: Declared output names or shapes (semantic; validation is implementation-specific).

tools.description: Tool names the agent may invoke. Must be a subset of or covered by permissions.

entrypoint.description: Optional entrypoint module or command (e.g. agent.run or main:run).

license.description: SPDX license identifier or custom license name.
